title: Meme Pictures
description: Adds funny paintings to your world
body:
Meme Pictures
Meme Pictures is a cosmetic Minecraft mod designed to bring internet culture and humor directly into your world. This mod adds a collection of custom paintings and decorative items featuring iconic memes, allowing players to personalize their bases with legendary internet moments.

Key Features
Custom Paintings: A wide variety of new painting variants ranging from classic vintage memes to modern viral sensations.

Decorative Blocks: Specialized frames and posters that can be placed on walls to showcase specific meme art.

Crafting Integration: All meme decorations are survival-friendly and can be crafted using standard materials like wool, sticks, and paper.

High Compatibility: Designed to work alongside other decoration mods without overriding default Minecraft paintings.

Gameplay Integration
The mod is intended for players who want to add a lighthearted or humorous touch to their builds. Whether you are decorating a secret basement, building a gallery of internet history, or pranking your friends on a multiplayer server, Meme Pictures provides the visual assets to make it happen.

[btw, i only make this for fun as a hobby so dont excpect updates often]
